title: Sales Engineers
description: Sell business goods or services, the selling of which requires a technical background equivalent to a baccalaureate degree in engineering.

tasks.text: Develop, present, or respond to proposals for specific customer requirements, including request for proposal responses and industry-specific solutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with sales teams to understand customer requirements, to promote the sale of company products, and to provide sales support.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create sales or service contracts for products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Visit prospective buyers at commercial, industrial, or other establishments to show samples or catalogs, and to inform them about product pricing, availability, and advantages.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Keep informed on industry news and trends, products, services, competitors, relevant information about legacy, existing, and emerging technologies, and the latest product-line developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify resale opportunities and support them to achieve sales plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with customers and engineers to assess equipment needs and to determine system requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and modify product configurations to meet customer needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and deliver technical presentations that explain products or services to customers and prospective customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend improved materials or machinery to customers, documenting how such changes will lower costs or increase production.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain sales forecasting reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Document account activities, generate reports, and keep records of business transactions with customers and suppliers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Research and identify potential customers for products or services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Secure and renew orders and arrange delivery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop sales plans to introduce products in new markets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend trade shows and seminars to promote products or to learn about industry developments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Attend company training seminars to become familiar with product lines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for demonstrations or trial installations of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train team members in the customer applications of technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sell products requiring extensive technical expertise and support for installation and use, such as material handling equipment, numerical-control machinery, or computer systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide information needed for the development of custom-made machinery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical and non-technical support and services to clients or other staff members regarding the use, operation, and maintenance of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Diagnose problems with installed equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write technical documentation for products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report to supervisors about prospective firms' credit ratings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
